filename: Company Plans - Questions for GTM Intake.docx
summary: This document outlines a strategic questionnaire for developing the Go-To-Market plan for KeepMeCompany's AI phone agents targeting NHS GP practices. It covers critical areas including sales cycles, pricing alignment with NHS budgets, regulatory compliance, and technical integration requirements. The content serves as an internal roadmap for addressing adoption barriers and defining the value proposition.
